name: Two-population (Goldie-Coldman) resistance model — HCC first line
description: Mechanistic resistance for HCC first line: a drug-sensitive clone S and a pre-existing drug-resistant clone R, observed as V = S + R (dS/dt = (kg - kd*E)*S, dR/dt = kgr*R). The drug kills only the sensitive clone; post-nadir regrowth is the resistant subpopulation outgrowing. kd is matched to the HCC Claret model so the contrast isolates the resistance MECHANISM. Values illustrative (HCC first-line scale) and unverified; R0 (initial resistant burden) is interpretable but practically unidentifiable from a short trial.
